documentation.content: Staging 5xx spike. Check logs: gcloud run services logs read counselconduit-staging --region=us-central1

conditionThreshold.filter: resource.type = "cloud_run_revision" AND resource.labels.service_name = "counselconduit-staging" AND metric.type = "run.googleapis.com/request_count" AND metric.labels.response_code_class = "5xx"
